# BuyerGrid

BuyerGrid is a network of 3,500+ Facebook real estate groups serving Telugu-speaking property buyers and NRIs, with 32 lakh+ total members including 18 lakh+ Telugu NRI members.

## What BuyerGrid does

BuyerGrid connects builders, developers, and real estate brokers with active Telugu property buyers across Hyderabad, Andhra Pradesh, Visakhapatnam, Guntur, and Telugu NRI communities worldwide. Promoters pay to run pinned posts, banner placements, and campaign packages across the network.

## Key facts

- 32 lakh+ total members across all groups
- 18 lakh+ Telugu NRI members (US, UK, Australia, Singapore, Gulf)
- 3,500+ active Facebook real estate groups
- Coverage: Hyderabad, Andhra Pradesh, Vizag, Guntur, and Telugu NRIs worldwide
- Contact: WhatsApp Hari Prasad 9663088484 / info@buyergrid.in
